title: 🌅 Sunset Ridge Run
description: Join us for a scenic evening run up Cleghorn Ridge. We'll catch sunset at the overlook and have a group campfire at the top. Bring your own firewood and beverages.

title: 🇺🇸 Vet & First Responder Meetup
description: Monthly meetup for veterans, active duty, and first responders. Family friendly. We'll run Lytle Creek and have a BBQ lunch at the campground after. All skill levels welcome.

title: ⛰️ Santiago Peak Challenge
description: Advanced run to the highest point in Orange County. Lifted rigs with skids required. We'll tackle the rocky sections as a group. Recovery gear mandatory. Experienced spotters on hand.
